meaning: adv.无事空扰地,大惊小怪地,小题大做地
examples: Scarcely waiting to remove his hat, he ran fussily up to prince andrey, and at once began talking.
"Ready, Diddy?" asked Aunt Petunia, fussily checking the clasp of her handbag so as to avoid looking at Harry altogether.
They bought the land five years ago and threw up a brick bungalow, fussily furnished and painted a satisfying shade of light blue.
